items.claim: Abdul Hussein has 15 wins with 14 of them coming inside the distance.
items.quote: this guy has 15 wins. 14 of them come inside the distance.

items.claim: Cody Gibson has been finished six times in his career.
items.quote: Cody Gibson's been finished, I believe, six times in his career.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is taking this fight on short notice.
items.quote: Cody Gibson's also taken this fight on short notice as well.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has fought good competition including Muhammad Mokaev and Tyson Nam.
items.quote: He's fought Muhammad Makaya. He's fought Tyson Dam, you know, guys that have been in the UFC.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein possesses tons of power on the feet, good wrestling, good grappling, and decent cardio.
items.quote: tons of power in the feet, good wrestling, good grappling. The cardio ain't half bad.

items.claim: Cody Gibson can slow down as he gets older and make mistakes in the grappling.
items.quote: Cody Gibson's a guy that as he's getting old, he can slow down. He can make mistakes in the grappling.

items.claim: Cody Gibson's chin could be in question after getting sparked by Long.
items.quote: The chin could be in question at this point after getting sparked by Long.
